seoTitle: How to Become QuickBooks Certified for Free
metaDescription: Get QuickBooks certified through Intuit's free ProAdvisor program, from creating an account to studying, testing, and earning your digital badge.
intro: Earning your QuickBooks certification can boost your bookkeeping career or help you land new clients, and it doesn't require paying for a third-party course. This guide covers setting up a free ProAdvisor account, working through the training modules, and passing the certification exam.

steps.heading: Create a free QuickBooks Online Accountant account
steps.body: Sign up on the QuickBooks Accountant portal and complete your firm profile to reach your main workspace dashboard.

steps.heading: Find the ProAdvisor training hub
steps.body: In the left sidebar, scroll to the Benefits section and click ProAdvisor, then switch to the Training tab to see your certification tracks.

steps.heading: Work through the self-paced modules
steps.body: Select the QuickBooks Online Certification path and click Resume or Start to work through video lessons and practical scenarios.

steps.heading: Use section quizzes to prepare
steps.body: Take advantage of the review quizzes within each module to spot-check your knowledge before attempting the real exam.

steps.heading: Take the certification exam
steps.body: Navigate to the Final Exam panel and start the test, aiming for a passing score of 80% or higher.

steps.heading: Download your certificate and badge
steps.body: Once you pass, go to the Certificates tab to download your printable PDF certificate and copy your verified digital badge assets.

faq.question: Is QuickBooks certification really free?
faq.answer: Yes, signing up for a free QuickBooks Online Accountant account gives you access to the full ProAdvisor training and certification program at no cost.

faq.question: What score do I need to pass the exam?
faq.answer: You'll need to score 80% or higher on the certification exam to earn your credential.

faq.question: Can I retake the exam if I fail a section?
faq.answer: The exam is broken into sections with retake windows, so you can revisit and retry material rather than starting completely over.

faq.question: What can I do with my certification once I earn it?
faq.answer: You can add your digital badge to your resume or social media profiles and activate a public ProAdvisor profile to attract new clients.
